title: Procedure of collecting auction proceed and amount realised from allotment by Nominated Authority.

IT. 54018/02/2015-#7-II ] 37:91 .17(T, 74'77 TrE4q re.u4un : L1511=iitui - (v-i) 04/0007/2003-15 3-R4NT:7 t i-IPT-111417 31-Nt-zp:r siebbic, MINISTRY OF COAL NO fifICATION New Delhi, the 10th November, 2015 G.S.R. 848(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 32 of the Coal Mines (Special Provisions) Act, 2015 (No. 11 of 2015) , the Central Government hereby direct the following, namely :- Procedure of collecting the auction proceeds and the amount realised from allotment by Nominated Authority :- The Nominated Authority, may by order direct the Successful Bidder or Allottee to deposit, the auction proceeds under clause (e) of sub-section 3 of section 6 of the Act or the amounts realised from allotment, as the case may be, to the respective State Government where Schedule I Coal Mines is located with an intimation to the Nominated Authority. [F.No.54018/02/2015-CA-II] R.P. GUPTA, Jt. Secy. 4751G1/2015 (1) -- 1 of 1 --
